## What
Brief description of the change.

## Why
The motivation. Link to issue if applicable: Closes #

## How
Implementation approach. Highlight any non-obvious decisions.

## Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Manually tested on: ___
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` passes (if web change)

## Screenshots
(For UI changes)

## Checklist
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, docs/) if needed
- [ ] No new TypeScript errors
- [ ] No console errors in browser

## Breaking changes?
- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes (explain below)
